vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị tràn lan
vocab.example: Due to rapid urban sprawl, our neighborhood has become a concrete jungle, leaving almost no room for parks.
Having more shared spaces would undoubtedly bolster communal cohesion among people from different backgrounds.

vocab.meaning: trung tâm/điểm nóng vui chơi giải trí
vocab.example: I would love to see a recreational hub nearby where teenagers can engage in sports instead of staying indoors.
There is a noticeable scarcity of open-air squares in this district, which makes it feel quite suffocating.
The government should prioritize the development of leisure amenities to cater to the growing local population.

vocab.meaning: khát mảng xanh/thiếu thốn cây xanh
vocab.example: Living in a greenery-starved environment can have a detrimental effect on one's psychological well-being.
A multipurpose facility could serve as both a library during the day and a community center in the evening.

vocab.meaning: nâng cao chất lượng sống/khả năng đáng sống
vocab.example: Adding more benches and fountains would greatly enhance the livability of the downtown area.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí trì trệ/tẻ nhạt
vocab.example: The current lack of public squares contributes to a somewhat stagnant atmosphere in our residential complex.

vocab.meaning: cải tạo/lấy lại không gian công cộng
vocab.example: There is a growing movement to reclaim public space from abandoned parking lots and turn them into gardens.
